race.comment: COUSINS DAY (3) is going well enough to win a highweight of this calibre. Raced too keen in front at Warrnambool last time, but went well in a 62 there prior off an easy win over 2156m this grade at Terang. The inside gate advantages and winning rider Parker is reunited. Has the class to win. THE KINGS GOSPEL (9) finished 2.25 lengths away last time out over 1864m at Kyneton a week-and-a-half ago. Placed over a middle distance at Stony Creek prior, finishing hard from the back of the field. Has decent claims. BOYSZEE (5) hasn't won for an age, but his near miss at Yarra Valley two back this grade stacks up. Deserves consideration after a brief freshen-up. IN YOUR HANDS (7) is on a 5-day back-up. Resumed over a staying distance at Pakenham off two hurdle trials. That's where he's likely headed, but he can't be ruled out.
